Fifty Shades Freed (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $100,407,760Details
International Box Office $271,577,258
Worldwide Box Office $371,985,018
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $18,912,183
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $13,802,097
Total $32,714,280
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Believing they have left behind shadowy figures from their past, newlyweds Christian and Ana fully embrace an inextricable connection and shared life of luxury. But just as she steps into her role as Mrs. Grey and he relaxes into an unfamiliar stability, new threats could jeopardize their happy ending before it even begins.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$38,560,195 (38.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.60 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:27.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$55,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,768 opening theaters/3,768 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $131,819,628

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 9th, 2018 (Wide) by Universal
February 9th, 2018 (IMAX) by Universal
International Releases: February 7th, 2018 (Wide) (Philippines)
February 7th, 2018 (Wide) (Belgium)
February 7th, 2018 (Wide) (Switzerland)
February 7th, 2018 (Wide) (Luxembourg)
February 8th, 2018 (Wide) (Lebanon)
Video Release: May 8th, 2018 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong sexual content, nudity, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2494 (Cert #51238), 9/20/2017)
Running Time: 120 minutes
Franchise: Fifty Shades of Grey
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Exes in Love, Fired, Relationships Gone Wrong, Revenge, Romance, Sexual Fetishism, The Past Catching up with You
Subgenre: Erotic Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Michael De Luca Productions, Universal Pictures, Perfect World Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
